title: A Shuttle Ride
question: 把今天的“喜欢出行但怕迷路 + 请工作人员提醒下车 + 看风景坐过站 + 既然车要返回就继续坐”放进公园接驳车场景。用 word bank 补完整 5 个空。
example_answer: I love visiting big parks, but I don't like losing my way. I got on the shuttle bus and spoke to the attendant. Please tell me where to get off. I sat in the front to get a good view. After some time, I realized with a shock that I was the only passenger left. We're going back now. In that case, I prefer to stay on the bus.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 说出你喜欢去大公园，但不喜欢迷路
options.english_template: I love visiting big parks, but I don't like ___.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 请车上的工作人员告诉你在哪里下车

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 说明你坐在前面是为了好好看风景
options.english_template: I sat in the front to get a ___.

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 说你震惊地发现自己是车上剩下的唯一乘客
options.english_template: I realized with a shock that I was the ___.

options.label: E
options.scenario_zh: 既然车要返回，你宁愿继续坐在车上
